### 🎭 Agent Checklist

Before submitting, check which agent tasks were fulfilled and validated:

- [ ] **💅 DivaAgent (UI/UX)**: Did you verify theme responsiveness? Does the layout look premium?
- [ ] **⚙️ TranscoderAgent (FFmpeg)**: Did you test container limits and hardware acceleration defaults?
- [ ] **🌐 PlatformAgent (Multiplatform)**: Does it compile on Tauri and work on WASM (if applicable)?
- [ ] **📝 LogAgent (Humor/Messages)**: Are log messages fun and formatted with emojis?
- [ ] **🔍 InspectorAgent (QA/Tests)**: Did you run test suites? Any visual/functional regression?

---

### 🎨 Visuals (if applicable)

Please add screenshots, GIFs, or video recordings showing the UI changes or the transcoding logs in action.

### 🔬 How Has This Been Tested?

2. *Test Case B (e.g., Switching between Minimalist and Drag modes)*
